reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve accuracy for future questions, especially as I move into higher level doors. I have 1 SP available and this is a foundational skill.

Unlocking pe_plan is a strategic priority. It provides a structured planning phase and a reflection step for every question, significantly increasing accuracy and reducing the risk of losing HP. With 1 SP available and Level 2 questions ahead, this is the optimal time to enhance my processing capabilities.
